description_long: This object consists of a group of various traffic signs, each mounted on a slender vertical post. The signs display a range of shapes, including rectangles and squares, and feature a variety of colors such as red, blue, yellow, green, and white. Some signs contain written instructions or warnings, while others display universally recognized symbols or pictograms. The posts appear to be metallic, likely made of galvanized steel, and the sign faces are likely made of reflective metal or plastic for visibility. The collection is arranged in a straight line, suggesting a display or reference set rather than a functional roadside installation. The signs are typical of those found in urban environments, providing information, warnings, or regulations to drivers and pedestrians.
description: A linear group of multiple urban traffic signs on metal posts, featuring various colors, texts, and symbols. The signs are rectangular or square and display regulatory, warning, and informational content.
description_view_0: A frontal view showing the faces of all traffic signs, revealing their colors, texts, and symbols.
description_view_1: A side view showing the thin profiles of the signs and posts, with sign faces barely visible.
description_view_2: A rear view of the signs, with the backs of the sign faces and posts visible, but no text or symbols discernible.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction, again showing the thin profiles of the signs and posts.
attribute_sign_text: DEAD END, NO PARKING ANY TIME, NO PARKING, NO SMOKING, NO ENTRY, CAUTION, DANGER, STOP, ONE WAY, LEFT TURN ONLY, RIGHT TURN ONLY, SPEED LIMIT 25, HANDICAPPED PARKING, NO U TURN
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: wheelchair symbol, no smoking symbol, no entry symbol, caution triangle, stop hand, directional arrows, speed limit number, U-turn arrow
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, parking lot entrance, school zone, neighborhood street
